content.text:
{
  "component": "accessing",
  "summary": "Symfony 8 access-management component with clear product identity, solid architecture, and broad test layers; main RC blockers are missing CI/ops automation and docs publication.",
  "strengths": [
    "Clear product scope and manifests",
    "Symfony 8 + Doctrine 3 layered architecture",
    "Comprehensive test layout (unit, integration, functional, browser, e2e)",
    "Built-in security features (2FA, email verification, reset, rate limiting)",
    "Composer scripts for lint, CS, static analysis, and tests"
  ],
  "risks": [
    "No CI/CD workflows present in-repo",
    "Static analysis and PHPUnit configs only as .dist",
    "Observability/operations integrations not evident",
    "Docs not wired to Antora report path",
    "Proprietary license may limit external adoption"
  ],
  "next_actions": [
    "Add GitHub Actions to run lint, cs:check, stan, unit/integration/functional, and Playwright e2e on PRs",
    "Promote phpstan.neon and phpunit.xml from .dist with tuned rules and coverage thresholds",
    "Publish product/architecture docs into .antora-src and wire report index",
    "Document and add health/metrics endpoints and basic runtime checks",
    "Define release and migration steps using existing Doctrine migrations"
  ],
  "notes": [
    "Assessment grounded in repository tree and manifests at commit bb0013dfbd4df3f201d4cae167f5de4bdf58967f",
    "Composer requires PHP ^8.4; ensure runtime environments match this requirement"
  ],
  "confidence": "medium",
  "evidence_paths": [
    "composer.json",
    "README.md",
    "PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md",
    "ARCHITECTURE_MANIFEST.md",
    "BOUNDING_MANIFEST.md",
    "FULL_MANIFEST.md",
    "phpunit.xml.dist",
    "phpstan.neon.dist",
    "playwright.config.ts",
    "package.json",
    "src/Entity",
    "src/RepositoryInterface",
    "src/ServiceInterface",
    "migrations",
    "public/index.php",
    ".env"
  ],
  "suggested_score_overrides": {
    "product": null,
    "architecture": null,
    "runtime": null,
    "qa": 8.4,
    "ops": 7.9,
    "market": null,
    "overall": 8.4
  },
  "metric_updates": {
    "product": {
      "summary": "Product identity is explicit for account access (registration, verification, MFA, recovery, sessions, security events) with supporting manifests.",
      "risks": [
        "Documentation not integrated with the Antora report path"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Publish product overview and user flows into .antora-src and link the report index"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "composer.json",
        "README.md",
        "PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md",
        "FULL_MANIFEST.md"
      ]
    },
    "architecture": {
      "summary": "Symfony 8 with Doctrine ORM 3 and layered structure (Entity, RepositoryInterface, ServiceInterface) plus recent migrations indicate a consistent architecture.",
      "risks": [
        "Static analysis is configured only via phpstan.neon.dist, reducing enforced consistency"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Commit a project-level phpstan.neon with agreed rule levels and baselines"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "composer.json",
        "src/Entity",
        "src/RepositoryInterface",
        "src/ServiceInterface",
        "migrations"
      ]
    },
    "runtime": {
      "summary": "Runtime surface is solid via Symfony Runtime, Monolog, and RateLimiter with environment configs and a standard public entrypoint.",
      "risks": [
        "No explicit metrics/tracing or performance instrumentation observed"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add health and metrics endpoints and document operational runbooks"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "composer.json",
        "public/index.php",
        ".env"
      ]
    },
    "qa": {
      "summary": "Broad QA posture with unit, integration, functional, Panther browser, and Playwright e2e tests plus lint/CS/static analysis scripts.",
      "risks": [
        "No CI present to enforce test and static analysis gates",
        "phpunit.xml and phpstan config are only provided as .dist"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Introduce CI to run pipeline:local:full and npm run test:e2e",
        "Promote and tune phpunit.xml and phpstan.neon with coverage thresholds and rule levels"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "tests/Unit",
        "tests/Integration",
        "tests/Functional",
        "tests/Panther",
        "tests/Playwright",
        "phpunit.xml.dist",
        "phpstan.neon.dist",
        ".php-cs-fixer.dist.php",
        "playwright.config.ts",
        "composer.json",
        "package.json"
      ]
    },
    "ops": {
      "summary": "Strong in-app security posture (2FA, verify email, reset password, password hashing, rate limiting) and logging via Monolog; delivery/ops automation is not in-repo.",
      "risks": [
        "No GitHub workflows or deployment automation found",
        "Observability (metrics/tracing/alerts) not evident",
        "Secrets management approach not documented beyond Dotenv for dev"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Add CI/CD workflows leveraging existing composer scripts and migrations",
        "Document runtime observability and integrate metrics/tracing",
        "Define environment-specific configuration and secret handling guidance"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "composer.json",
        "config/bundles.php",
        ".env",
        "README.md"
      ]
    },
    "market": {
      "summary": "Market alignment is clear for an access-management component, with manifests and README describing scope and positioning; license is proprietary.",
      "risks": [
        "Proprietary license may limit external contribution and adoption"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Surface integration scenarios and positioning in published documentation"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "README.md",
        "PRODUCT_MANIFEST.md",
        "composer.json"
      ]
    },
    "overall": {
      "summary": "Engineering shape and feature set appear RC-ready, but missing CI/ops automation and documentation publication keep the component pre-RC.",
      "risks": [
        "Lack of CI/CD and observability slows RC confidence"
      ],
      "improvements": [
        "Implement CI pipelines and publish Antora documentation to close RC gaps"
      ],
      "evidence": [
        "composer.json",
        "tests",
        "migrations",
        "README.md"
      ]
    }
  }
}
